get.description: List the operations for the provider

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: The API version to use for this operation.

schema.description: A list of REST API operations supported by an Azure Resource Provider. It contains an URL link to get the next set of results.

value.description: List of operations supported by the resource provider

items.title: REST API Operation
items.description: Details of a REST API operation, returned from the Resource Provider Operations API

name.description: The name of the operation, as per Resource-Based Access Control (RBAC). Examples: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/write", "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/capture/action"

isDataAction.description: Whether the operation applies to data-plane. This is "true" for data-plane operations and "false" for ARM/control-plane operations.

display.description: Localized display information for this particular operation.

provider.description: The localized friendly form of the resource provider name, e.g. "Microsoft Monitoring Insights" or "Microsoft Compute".

resource.description: The localized friendly name of the resource type related to this operation. E.g. "Virtual Machines" or "Job Schedule Collections".

operation.description: The concise, localized friendly name for the operation; suitable for dropdowns. E.g. "Create or Update Virtual Machine", "Restart Virtual Machine".

description.description: The short, localized friendly description of the operation; suitable for tool tips and detailed views.

origin.description: The intended executor of the operation; as in Resource Based Access Control (RBAC) and audit logs UX. Default value is "user,system"

actionType.description: Enum. Indicates the action type. "Internal" refers to actions that are for internal only APIs.

nextLink.description: URL to get the next set of operation list results (if there are any).

post.description: Check the availability of the resource name for the given location.

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: The API version to use for this operation.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: The ID of the target subscription. The value must be an UUID.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: The name of the Azure region.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The CheckAvailability request

name.description: The name of the resource for which availability needs to be checked.

type.description: The resource type.

nameAvailable.description: Indicates if the resource name is available.

reason.description: The reason why the given name is not available.

message.description: Detailed reason why the given name is available.

get.description: Returns the list of all provider offerings available for the given location.

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: The API version to use for this operation.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: The ID of the target subscription. The value must be an UUID.

parameters.name: locationName
parameters.description: Location.

schema.description: The response of a list Providers operation.

value.description: The ProviderDescription items on this page

items.description: Information about an offering. A provider offering is an entity that offers Targets to run Azure Quantum Jobs.

id.description: Unique provider's id.

targets.description: The list of targets available from this provider.

items.description: Information about a Target. A target is the component that can process a specific type of Job.

id.description: Unique target id.

acceptedDataFormats.description: List of data formats accepted by this target.

acceptedContentEncodings.description: List of content encodings accepted by this target.

skus.description: The list of skus available from this provider.

items.description: Information about a specific sku.

id.description: Unique sku id.

restrictedAccessUri.description: Uri to subscribe to the restricted access sku.

autoAdd.description: Flag to indicate whether the sku should be automatically added during workspace creation.

targets.description: The list of targets available for this sku.

quotaDimensions.description: The list of quota dimensions for this sku.

items.description: Information about a specific quota dimension.

id.description: Unique id of this dimension.

scope.description: The scope of this quota dimension.

period.description: The reset period of this quota dimension.

quota.description: The max limit of this dimension.

name.description: The display name of this quota dimension.

description.description: A description about this quota dimension.

unit.description: The standard unit of measurement used for this quota dimension.

unitPlural.description: The standard unit of measurement used for this quota dimension in plural form.

pricingDetails.description: The list of pricing details for the sku.

items.description: Detailed pricing information for an sku.

id.description: Unique id for this pricing information.

value.description: The unit cost of this sku.

quotaDimensions.description: The list of quota dimensions from the provider.

items.description: Information about a specific quota dimension.

id.description: Unique id of this dimension.

scope.description: The scope of this quota dimension.

period.description: The reset period of this quota dimension.

quota.description: The max limit of this dimension.

name.description: The display name of this quota dimension.

description.description: A description about this quota dimension.

unit.description: The standard unit of measurement used for this quota dimension.

unitPlural.description: The standard unit of measurement used for this quota dimension in plural form.

pricingDimensions.description: The list of pricing dimensions from the provider.

items.description: Information about pricing dimension.

id.description: Unique id of this pricing dimension.

name.description: The display name of this pricing dimension.

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

get.description: Returns the SuiteOffer resource associated with the given name.

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: The API version to use for this operation.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: The ID of the target subscription. The value must be an UUID.

schema.description: The response of a QuantumSuiteOffer list operation.

value.description: The QuantumSuiteOffer items on this page

items.description: A Quantum Suite Offer that is available to a subscription.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

providerId.description: The provider ID of the offer.

providerName.description: The provider name of the offer.

companyName.description: The name of the company that is providing this offer.

location.description: The location where this offer is available.

quotas.description: Quota allocations associated with this offer.

standardMinutesLifetime.description: Lifetime limit for standard priority jobs execution in minutes.

highMinutesLifetime.description: Lifetime limit for high priority jobs execution in minutes.

allOf.title: Proxy Resource
allOf.description: The resource model definition for a Azure Resource Manager proxy resource. It will not have tags and a location

allOf.title: Resource
allOf.description: Common fields that are returned in the response for all Azure Resource Manager resources

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. E.g. "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}"

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

get.description: Gets the list of Workspaces within a Subscription.

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: The API version to use for this operation.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: The ID of the target subscription. The value must be an UUID.

schema.description: The response of a QuantumWorkspace list operation.

value.description: The QuantumWorkspace items on this page

items.description: The resource proxy definition object for Quantum Workspace.

properties.description: Gets or sets the properties. Define quantum workspace's specific properties.

providers.description: List of Providers selected for this Workspace

items.description: Information about a Provider. A Provider is an entity that offers Targets to run Azure Quantum Jobs.

providerSku.description: The sku associated with pricing information for this provider.

instanceUri.description: A Uri identifying the specific instance of this provider.

applicationName.description: The provider's marketplace application display name.

resourceUsageId.description: Id to track resource usage for the provider.

usable.description: Whether the current workspace is ready to accept Jobs.

values.name: Yes
values.description: The workspace is usable and can accept jobs.

values.name: No
values.description: The workspace is not usable and cannot accept jobs.

values.name: ProviderLaunching
values.description: The Workspace is currently starting to provision a provider.

values.name: ProviderUpdating
values.description: The Workspace is currently updating a provider.

values.name: ProviderDeleting
values.description: The Workspace is currently deleting a provider.

values.name: ProviderProvisioning
values.description: The Workspace is currently provisioning a provider.

storageAccount.description: ARM Resource Id of the storage account associated with this workspace.

endpointUri.description: The URI of the workspace endpoint.

apiKeyEnabled.description: Indicator of enablement of the Quantum workspace Api keys.

items.description: Managed-On-Behalf-Of broker resource. This resource is created by the Resource Provider to manage some resources on behalf of the user.

id.description: Resource identifier of a Managed-On-Behalf-Of broker resource

managedStorageAccount.description: ARM Resource Id of the managed storage account associated with this workspace.

quotas.description: Quota allocations associated with this workspace. Available only for special providers.

standardMinutesLifetime.description: Lifetime limit for standard priority jobs execution in minutes.

highMinutesLifetime.description: Lifetime limit for high priority jobs execution in minutes.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

principalId.description: The service principal ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

tenantId.description: The tenant ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

type.description: Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

userAssignedIdentities.title: User-Assigned Identities
userAssignedIdentities.description: The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.

principalId.description: The principal ID of the assigned identity.

clientId.description: The client ID of the assigned identity.

allOf.title: Tracked Resource
allOf.description: The resource model definition for an Azure Resource Manager tracked top level resource which has 'tags' and a 'location'

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

allOf.title: Resource
allOf.description: Common fields that are returned in the response for all Azure Resource Manager resources

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. E.g. "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}"

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

post.description: Get the keys to use with the Quantum APIs. A key is used to authenticate and authorize access to the Quantum REST APIs. Only one key is needed at a time; two are given to provide seamless key regeneration.

items.description: Information about a Provider. A Provider is an entity that offers Targets to run Azure Quantum Jobs.

providerSku.description: The sku associated with pricing information for this provider.

instanceUri.description: A Uri identifying the specific instance of this provider.

applicationName.description: The provider's marketplace application display name.

resourceUsageId.description: Id to track resource usage for the provider.

usable.description: Whether the current workspace is ready to accept Jobs.

values.name: Yes
values.description: The workspace is usable and can accept jobs.

values.name: No
values.description: The workspace is not usable and cannot accept jobs.

values.name: ProviderLaunching
values.description: The Workspace is currently starting to provision a provider.

values.name: ProviderUpdating
values.description: The Workspace is currently updating a provider.

values.name: ProviderDeleting
values.description: The Workspace is currently deleting a provider.

values.name: ProviderProvisioning
values.description: The Workspace is currently provisioning a provider.

storageAccount.description: ARM Resource Id of the storage account associated with this workspace.

endpointUri.description: The URI of the workspace endpoint.

apiKeyEnabled.description: Indicator of enablement of the Quantum workspace Api keys.

items.description: Managed-On-Behalf-Of broker resource. This resource is created by the Resource Provider to manage some resources on behalf of the user.

id.description: Resource identifier of a Managed-On-Behalf-Of broker resource

managedStorageAccount.description: ARM Resource Id of the managed storage account associated with this workspace.

quotas.description: Quota allocations associated with this workspace. Available only for special providers.

standardMinutesLifetime.description: Lifetime limit for standard priority jobs execution in minutes.

highMinutesLifetime.description: Lifetime limit for high priority jobs execution in minutes.
